name: Artisan
description: AI BDR Ava automates outbound prospecting across email and social with 250M+ verified B2B contacts.

seo.title: Artisan — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Artisan: AI BDR Ava automates outbound prospecting across email and social with 250M+ verified B2B contacts.

when_to_use: Automated B2B prospecting with 250M+ verified contacts
AI-driven outbound across email and LinkedIn simultaneously
Scaling outreach for a new product launch without SDR headcount
Personalized cold email sequences based on company signals
Lead generation for enterprise sales at low variable cost

pros: Ava bundles data, enrichment and sending in one seat
Replaces stack of Apollo, Outreach and enrichment tools
Autopilot mode reduces manual campaign setup
cons: Data freshness lags pure-play providers like ZoomInfo
Heavy AI-generated emails can trip spam filters
Locked into Artisans workflow, limited integrations
Pricing starts high for small teams
review.verdict: All-in-one AI BDR that works if you trust the black box; less flexibility than modular stacks.
review.best_for: Series A-C B2B SaaS that want outbound running in a week
review.not_for: Ops teams who need granular control over data and sequencing
